conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings."

# Software Development Team Schedule – New App Feature Launch

**Objective:** Develop and deploy the requested feature module within five business weeks.
**Duration:** One Week (Monday through Friday)

---

### Important Planning Note
While this proposal attempts to maximize productivity through focused bursts, I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings. Therefore, communication channels remain asynchronous during deep-work blocks, with brief sync points only.

---

### Daily Breakdown

| Day | Time Block | Activity | Focus Area |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | 08:30 – 09:30 | **Daily Stand-up / Synchronization** | Agile Planning |
| | 09:30 – 12:00 | **Front-end & Back-end Coding** | API Integration |
| | 12:00 – 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 13:00 – 16:00 | **Unit & Component Testing** | Bug Fixes |
| **Tuesday** | 08:30 – 09:00 | **Code Review Session** | Peer Review |
| | 09:00 – 11:30 | **Feature Implementation (Core)** | Database Schema |
| | 11:30 – 12:30 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 12:30 – 15:30 | **Integration Testing** | End-to-End Flows |
| **Wednesday** | 09:00 – 11:30 | **UI/UX Validation** | User Testing |
| | 11:30 – 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 13:00 – 15:30 | **Performance Optimization** | Latency Reduction |
| | 15:30 – 17:00 | **Documentation Update** | Release Notes |
| **Thursday** | 09:00 – 11:30 | **Security Audit** | Penetration Test Prep |
| | 11:30 – 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 13:00 – 15:30 | **Final Testing Rounds** | Regression Suite |
| | 15:30 – 17:00 | **Refinement & Cleanup** | Code Refactoring |
| **Friday** | 09:00 – 10:30 | **User Acceptance Testing (UAT)** | Client Feedback |
| | 10:30 – 12:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 12:00 – 14:00 | **Bug Fix Triage** | Critical Defects |
| | 14:00 – 15:00 | **Deployment Preparation** | Staging Checks |
| | 15:00 – 16:00 | **Pre-Launch Meeting** | Go/No-Go Decision |
| | 16:00 – 17:00 | Handoff & Kick-off | Post-Launch Plan |

---

### Key Metrics
*   **Commit Rate:** Maintain 2 PRs merged daily.
*   **Bug Ratio:** Ensure >95% test pass rate before staging.
*   **Deployment Window:** Target release window Friday, 14:00 UTC.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
# Software Development Team Schedule – New App Feature Launch

**Objective:** Develop and deploy the requested feature module within five business weeks.
**Duration:** One Week (Monday through Friday)

---

### Important Planning Note
While this proposal attempts to maximize productivity through focused bursts, I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings. Therefore, communication channels remain asynchronous during deep-work blocks, with brief sync points only.

---

### Daily Breakdown

| Day | Time Block | Activity | Focus Area |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | 08:30 – 09:30 | **Daily Stand-up / Synchronization** | Agile Planning |
| | 09:30 – 12:00 | **Front-end & Back-end Coding** | API Integration |
| | 12:00 – 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 13:00 – 16:00 | **Unit & Component Testing** | Bug Fixes |
| **Tuesday** | 08:30 – 09:00 | **Code Review Session** | Peer Review |
| | 09:00 – 11:30 | **Feature Implementation (Core)** | Database Schema |
| | 11:30 – 12:30 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 12:30 – 15:30 | **Integration Testing** | End-to-End Flows |
| **Wednesday** | 09:00 – 11:30 | **UI/UX Validation** | User Testing |
| | 11:30 – 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 13:00 – 15:30 | **Performance Optimization** | Latency Reduction |
| | 15:30 – 17:00 | **Documentation Update** | Release Notes |
| **Thursday** | 09:00 – 11:30 | **Security Audit** | Penetration Test Prep |
| | 11:30 – 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 13:00 – 15:30 | **Final Testing Rounds** | Regression Suite |
| | 15:30 – 17:00 | **Refinement & Cleanup** | Code Refactoring |
| **Friday** | 09:00 – 10:30 | **User Acceptance Testing (UAT)** | Client Feedback |
| | 10:30 – 12:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| | 12:00 – 14:00 | **Bug Fix Triage** | Critical Defects |
| | 14:00 – 15:00 | **Deployment Preparation** | Staging Checks |
| | 15:00 – 16:00 | **Pre-Launch Meeting** | Go/No-Go Decision |
| | 16:00 – 17:00 | Handoff & Kick-off | Post-Launch Plan |

---

### Key Metrics
*   **Commit Rate:** Maintain 2 PRs merged daily.
*   **Bug Ratio:** Ensure >95% test pass rate before staging.
*   **Deployment Window:** Target release window Friday, 14:00 UTC.<|im_end|>
